task_completion.description: Create a new Data Element named 'Prostate Screening [Task]'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Data Element creation form or the Data Element list in the DHIS2 Maintenance app with 'Prostate Screening [Task]' visible.

task_completion.description: Configure the Data Element as aggregate positive integers with the 'Gender' category combination
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Data Element configuration showing 'Domain type' as Aggregate, 'Value Type' as Positive Integer, and 'Category combination' set to 'Gender'.

task_completion.description: Add the new Data Element to the target dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Dataset configuration page (Data Elements tab) showing 'Prostate Screening [Task]' selected and assigned to the 'Morbidity' or 'PHUF 1 - Morbidity' dataset.

task_completion.description: Create a new form section named 'NCD Screening [Task]' containing the new Data Element
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Dataset 'Sections' configuration showing a section named 'NCD Screening [Task]' with 'Prostate Screening [Task]' included in its selected data elements.

task_completion.description: Disable the 'Female' field for the 'Prostate Screening [Task]' data element in the dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Dataset 'Data Entry Form' or 'Grey Fields' configuration tab showing the intersection for 'Prostate Screening [Task]' and 'Female' disabled (greyed out or checked as disabled).

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web interface to perform the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 Maintenance app in a web browser, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configurations in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of UI success popups (e.g., 'Data element created', 'Dataset saved') or the newly created items appearing in the standard list views after saving.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the UI or type expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows a standard DHIS2 instance URL and the interface strictly matches the DHIS2 Maintenance application without signs of HTML manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The requested dataset 'PHU Monthly 1 - Morbidity (Old)' does not exist in the database. Accept 'Morbidity' or 'PHUF 1 - Morbidity' as the valid target dataset. The target Data Element is 'Prostate Screening [Task]', which must have the 'Gender' category combination. The target section is 'NCD Screening [Task]'. The agent must disable the 'Female' option for this data element in the dataset's form configuration.
